accepted: solar may be central, per-component, hybrid or absent
all nine OpenBREC role categories have energy mappings
eight source adapters declare safety and evidence requirements
L0 life-safety is preserved until hardware safety requires cutoff
storage-only and sustainable-under-profile claims remain distinct and bounded
not_accepted: physical battery capacity, solar yield, runtime or 72-hour autonomy
OS-03 or later Open Spec tasks
